name: pr-rosey
description: TypeScript monorepo for the pr-rosey CLI.

scripts.build: tsgo -b && node -e "const { chmodSync, existsSync } = require('node:fs'); const bin = 'apps/cli/dist/index.js'; if (existsSync(bin)) chmodSync(bin, 0o755);"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test
scripts.clean:workspaces: node -e "const { rmSync } = require('node:fs'); for (const dir of ['apps/cli/dist', 'packages/shared/dist', 'coverage']) rmSync(dir, { recursive: true, force: true });"
